description_long: Three golden-brown spring rolls are neatly arranged on a rectangular white tray, accompanied by a small round dish of reddish-brown dipping sauce. The spring rolls have a crisp, cylindrical appearance with open ends, revealing a hollow or lightly filled interior. The wrapper is smooth and matte, with subtle folds and a slightly uneven texture typical of fried pastry. The dipping sauce sits in a shallow, dark-edged bowl, providing a visual contrast to the light tray and rolls. No garnish or decorative elements are present, giving the presentation a clean and simple look. The overall setup suggests a ready-to-eat snack or appetizer, commonly found in urban food stalls or casual dining settings.
description: Three golden-brown spring rolls rest side-by-side on a white tray with a small bowl of reddish dipping sauce, creating a clean and appetizing presentation.
description_view_0: Two spring rolls are seen end-on, with the third partially visible behind, and the dipping sauce bowl is mostly hidden.
description_view_1: All three spring rolls are clearly visible, arranged side-by-side, with the dipping sauce bowl fully in view to the right.
description_view_2: The spring rolls are viewed from the side, with their lengths visible and the dipping sauce bowl in the foreground.
description_view_3: The open ends of all three spring rolls face the viewer, with the dipping sauce bowl to the left.
